heading: Special provisions with respect to institutions that are supervised by Federal banking agencies
label: 4715 Special provisions with respect to institutions that are supervised by Federal banking agencies

children.text: an insured community development financial institution;
any community development financial institution that is examined by or subject to the reporting requirements of an appropriate Federal banking agency; or
any community development financial institution that has as its community partner an institution that is examined by or subject to the reporting requirements of an appropriate Federal banking agency.

children.heading: Requests for information, reports, or records
children.label: b Requests for information, reports, or records

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (4), notwithstanding any other provisions of this subchapter, prior to directly requesting information from or imposing reporting or recordkeeping requirements on an insured community development financial institution or other institution that is examined by or subject to the reporting requirements of an appropriate Federal banking agency, the Fund shall consult with the appropriate Federal banking agency to determine if the information requested is available from or may be obtained by such agency in the form, format, or detail required by the Fund.

children.heading: Timing of response from appropriate Federal banking agency
children.label: 2 Timing of response from appropriate Federal banking agency
children.text: If the information, reports, or records requested by the Fund pursuant to paragraph (1) are not provided by the appropriate Federal banking agency in less than 15 calendar days after the date on which the material is requested, the Fund may request the information from or impose the recordkeeping or reporting requirements directly on such institutions with notice to the appropriate Federal banking agency.

children.heading: Elimination of duplicative information and reporting requirements
children.label: 3 Elimination of duplicative information and reporting requirements
children.text: The Fund shall use any information provided the appropriate Federal banking agency under this section to the extent practicable to eliminate duplicative requests for information and reports from, and recordkeeping by an insured community development financial institution or other institution that is examined by or subject to the reporting requirements of an appropriate Federal banking agency.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: 4 Exception
children.text: Notwithstanding paragraphs (1) and (2), the Fund may require an insured community development financial institution or other institution that is examined by or subject to the reporting requirements of an appropriate Federal banking agency to provide information with respect to the institution’s implementation of its strategic plan or compliance with the terms of its assistance agreement under this subchapter, after providing notice to the appropriate Federal banking agency.

children.heading: Exclusion for examination reports
children.label: c Exclusion for examination reports
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to permit the Fund to require an insured community development financial institution or other institution that is examined by or subject to the reporting requirements of an appropriate Federal banking agency, to obtain, maintain, or furnish an examination report of any appropriate Federal banking agency or records contained in or related to such a report.

children.heading: Sharing of information
children.label: d Sharing of information
children.text: The Fund and the appropriate Federal banking agency shall promptly notify each other of material concerns about an insured community development financial institution or other institution that is examined by or subject to the reporting requirements of an appropriate Federal banking agency, and share appropriate information relating to such concerns.

children.heading: Disclosure prohibited
children.label: e Disclosure prohibited
children.text: Neither the Fund nor the appropriate Federal banking agency shall disclose confidential information obtained pursuant to this section from any party without the written consent of that party.

children.heading: Privilege maintained
children.label: f Privilege maintained
children.text: The Fund, the appropriate Federal banking agency, and any other party providing information under this section shall not be deemed to have waived any privilege applicable to any information or data, or any portion thereof, by providing such information or data to the other party or by permitting such data or information, or any copies or portions thereof, to be used by the other party.

children.heading: Exceptions
children.label: g Exceptions
children.text: Nothing in this section shall authorize the Fund or the appropriate Federal banking agency to withhold information from the Congress or prevent it from complying with a request for information from a Federal department or agency in compliance with applicable law.

children.heading: Notification
children.label: 1 Notification
children.text: The Fund shall notify the appropriate Federal banking agency before imposing any sanction pursuant to the authority in on an insured community development financial institution or other institution that is examined by or subject to the reporting requirements of that agency.section 4707(f)(2)(C) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: objects to the proposed sanction;

children.label: i
children.text: have a material adverse effect on the safety and soundness of the institution; or

children.label: ii
children.text: impede or interfere with an enforcement action against that institution by that agency;

children.label: C
children.text: proposes a comparable alternative action; and

children.label: i
children.text: the basis for the determination under subparagraph (B) and, if appropriate, provides documentation to support the determination; and

children.label: ii
children.text: how the alternative action suggested pursuant to subparagraph (C) would be as effective as the sanction proposed by the Fund in securing compliance with this subchapter and deterring future noncompliance.

children.heading: Safety and soundness considerations
children.label: i Safety and soundness considerations
children.text: The Fund and each appropriate Federal banking agency shall cooperate and respond to requests from each other and from other appropriate Federal banking agencies in a manner that ensures the safety and soundness of the insured community development financial institution or other institution that is examined by or subject to the reporting requirements of an appropriate Federal banking agency.
